industrial_value: Highest ROI per dollar invested. Mechanical faults account for ~40% of CNC failures. Vibration monitoring provides the single largest accuracy gain at the lowest cost. Recommended as the immediate first step.

Addresses electrical fault signatures invisible to vibration alone. Motor winding and power quality issues account for ~25% of failures. Combined with Phase 1, pushes Youden's J above 0.60 — approaching usable ML territory.

Highest strategic value despite higher CAPEX. Thermal imaging provides early warning for the most catastrophic failure modes (thermal runaway, insulation breakdown). Completes the multi-physics monitoring suite.
